title: Basic JavaScript Event Loop
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Event Loop. Focus on implementing Call stack correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Event Loop
description: Create a function that uses Call stack and Task queue (macrotasks) together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Event Loop Project
description: Build a small application that applies Call stack, Task queue (macrotasks), Microtask queue in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Event Loop
description: The following code has bugs related to Call stack. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Event Loop
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Call stack and Task queue (macrotasks).
